sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Edict.Diocl. = Edictum Diocletiani,</title_> ed. T. Mommsen & H. Blümner, <title_ TEIform="title">Der Maximaltarif des Diocletian,</title_> Berlin 1893; suppl. <title_ TEIform="title">CIL</title_> iii pp. 1926 ff., 2208 ff., 232857 ff.: cited where possible by Momm- sen's chaps. & lines, recently found portions by place of discovery (<title_ TEIform="title">Aeg.</title_> = Aegira; <title_ TEIform="title">Clit.</title_> = Clitor; <title_ TEIform="title">Delph.</title_> = Delphi; <title_ TEIform="title">Troez.</title_> = Troezen); <title_ TEIform="title">Geronthr. = IG</title_>5(1)1115; <title_ TEIform="title">Gyth.</title_> = 5(1)1148.</item>
